introSection: Barracuda is a steel roller coaster at Jolly Roger Amusement Park in Ocean City, Maryland, USA. Originally located at Jenkinson's Boardwalk in Point Pleasant Beach, New Jersey from 1992 until 2018, the ride opened at Jolly Roger on June 4, 2019. Barracuda is a Flitzer coaster manufactured by Zierer; is the second Flitzer to operate at Jolly Roger following Racing, which briefly operated at the park during the summer of 2007. It is the last Flitzer in the world to operate at a fixed amusement park.
fullText:
Barracuda is a steel roller coaster at Jolly Roger Amusement Park in Ocean City, Maryland, USA. Originally located at Jenkinson's Boardwalk in Point Pleasant Beach, New Jersey from 1992 until 2018, the ride opened at Jolly Roger on June 4, 2019. Barracuda is a Flitzer coaster manufactured by Zierer; is the second Flitzer to operate at Jolly Roger following Racing, which briefly operated at the park during the summer of 2007. It is the last Flitzer in the world to operate at a fixed amusement park.



Blue track and grey supports.
